<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right. The cell to my right at row 02 column C is lava, so I cannot move forward. To reach the goal at row 08 column H, I should go down along the safe open path in column B. From facing right, turning right will make me face down.
</thought>
<action>

</action>
